title: COMMUNITY FOOD BANK - 211info
text: SOUTH COUNTY COMMUNITY FOOD BANK COMMUNITY FOOD BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency food boxes with a three to five day supply of food. Offers hygiene items, incontinence diapers, and laundry soap. May have infant diapers and formula depending on supplies. Accepts donations. 2041 N Roosevelt Drive Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Must meet USDA income guidelines Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 12:45pm-3:45pm Email (503) 738-9800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 738-9800 Main phone Main phone (503) 738-9800 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Food Pantry: Walk in. Call ahead to confirm availability of additional items other than food. Donations: Visit website for list of needed items FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: South Clatsop County including Seaside, Gearhart, and Cannon Beach TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on east side of Highway 101 in Seaside across from the old Seaside High School, next door to the Bus Barn. Services: Diapers Food Donation Programs Food Pantries Incontinence Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTH COUNTY COMMUNITY FOOD BANK
